bio.short: IT consultant based in Billingstad with a practical grip on Microsoft 365 — from access management and device administration to building workflows and tools that make everyday work a bit less painful.
bio.long: I have a bachelor's degree in IT and information systems from UiA (2017) and have spent most of my career at Norsk Psykologforening, handling everything from Entra ID and access management to Intune, Dynamics CRM, and internal tooling. My approach is practical: reach for the simplest thing that actually solves the problem well.

experience.title: IT-vikar
experience.summary: IT support, access management, hardware procurement, AV operations, and project coordination. Broad responsibility across all day-to-day IT matters.
highlights: Administrering og tilgangsstyring i Entra ID
Ansvar for AV og generell drift

experience.title: IT-konsulent
experience.summary: Entra ID administration, vendor relations, DevOps development requests, internal training, and workflow modernisation. Covered for the IT manager during a period of high demand.
highlights: Intern opplæring og modernisering av arbeidsflyter

experience.title: IT-konsulent
experience.summary: Supported the IT department through a demanding Dynamics CRM transition, taking on IT manager responsibilities to free up capacity for critical system work.
